name: HWR_SRVY_TOPIC_PER_SRVY
description: This will store information regarding the topics associated with the survey being created. Table specific for meeting survey.

columns.Name: SURVEY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Survey Id identifying the Survey entry in this table.

columns.Name: TOPIC_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Topic ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: TOPIC_PER_SRVY_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: TOPIC_PER_SRVY_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Comments: TOPIC_PER_SRVY_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Comments: TOPIC_PER_SRVY_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: TOPIC_PER_SRVY_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: TOPIC_PER_SRVY_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
